description_long: This is a classic two-door refrigerator with a retro-inspired design, featuring a smooth, light gray exterior. The front doors are adorned with several colorful photographs and notes, each held in place by red magnets, adding a personal and lived-in touch. The upper compartment is slightly smaller, likely intended for freezer storage, while the lower section serves as the main refrigeration area. Both doors have prominent, vertically oriented, protruding handles for easy access. The sides and top of the refrigerator are plain and unadorned, with a consistent gray finish. No visible vents, control panels, or brand logos are present on the exterior.
description: A light gray, two-door refrigerator with protruding handles and photos attached by red magnets on the front. The design is smooth and retro, with a clean, unadorned finish on the sides and top.
description_view_0: The back of the refrigerator, showing a plain, smooth gray surface with no visible features or details.
description_view_1: The left side of the refrigerator, displaying a flat gray panel and a partial view of the protruding handles and magnets on the front.
description_view_2: The front of the refrigerator, featuring two doors with protruding handles and several photos and notes attached by red magnets.
description_view_3: The right side of the refrigerator, similar to the left, with a plain gray surface and a partial view of the handles and magnets on the front.
attribute_door_handle_style: Protruding vertical handles, mounted on the right edge of each door, simple and functional design.
